signals.headline: Solana Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade Advances with Firedancer Progress and Governance Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade Advances with Firedancer Progress and Governance Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana's network hit a record 167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-vote transactions as of April 14, 2026, fueled by the Alpenglow upgrade slashing finality to 150 milliseconds and Firedancer validator developments.[2][6]
